zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Raleigh於1190年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特內特萊可姆時，他的父親Richard de Raleigh66歲，母親Mrs. Warin De Raleigh41歲。他於大約1190年與Mrs Warin de Raleigh在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1242年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Raleigh于1190年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特內特萊可姆时，他的父亲Richard de Raleigh66岁，母亲Mrs. Warin De Raleigh41岁。他于大约1190年与Mrs Warin de Raleigh在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1242年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Raleigh was born in 1190, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Raleigh, was 66 and his mother, Mrs. Warin De Raleigh, was 41. He married Mrs Warin de Raleigh about 1190, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1242, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Raleigh est né en 1190, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Raleigh, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Warin De Raleigh, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Warin de Raleigh environ 1190, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1242, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Raleigh 1190 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Raleigh 66 und seine Mutter Mrs. Warin De Raleigh 41. Er hat um 1190 in Somerset, England Mrs Warin de Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1242 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Raleigh è nato il nel 1190 nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Raleigh, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Warin De Raleigh, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Warin de Raleigh circa 1190, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1242, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Raleighが1190年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベで生まれた時，父Richard de Raleighは66歳，母Mrs. Warin De Raleighは41歳であった。約1190年にイギリスソメルセトでMrs Warin de Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1242年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Raleigh(이)가 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Raleigh(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Warin De Raleigh(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1190년 영국 서머세트에서 Mrs Warin de Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1242년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Raleigh nasceu em 1190, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Raleigh, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Warin De Raleigh, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Warin de Raleigh aproximadamente 1190, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1242, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Raleigh родился в 1190 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Raleigh было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Warin De Raleigh, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Warin de Raleigh около 1190 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1242 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warin de Raleigh nació en 1190, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Raleigh, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Mrs. Warin De Raleigh, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Mrs Warin de Raleigh aproximadamente 1190, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1242, a la edad de 53 años.
